news.title: FDA urges clinical trial sponsors to report the results of their studies

news.title: Kailera outlines plans for $528.5M IPO to support quartet of Chinese obesity assets

news.title: Spyre points to phase 2 win for ulcerative colitis drug as proof it could take on Takeda’s Entyvio
news.snippet: Spyre Therapeutics’ monoclonal antibody hit the key goal in a phase 2 study for ulcerative colitis, which the company has touted as proof it can best Takeda’s Entyvio.

news.title: Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker '26: Neomorph nabs $100M; Vivatides' $54M series A
news.snippet: The Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker records venture capital rounds of $50 million or more secured by biotechs.

news.title: AbbVie inks $745M deal with Chinese biotech Haisco for two acute pain assets
news.snippet: AbbVie has agreed to pay $30 million upfront to Chinese biotech Haisco Pharmaceutical Group for two non-opioid pain treatment candidates.

news.title: Retractable Technologies trims staff to save $2.2M annually as tariffs bite
news.snippet: Retractable Technologies, the maker of a retractable needle and other safety medical products, is cutting roughly 16% of its workforce in a cost-saving move to reduce overhead by $2.2 million a year a

news.title: Beyond the Hype: Turning NAMs into Actionable Evidence
news.snippet: NAMs are no longer theoretical. The real challenge now is choosing the right tools—and generating data that holds up when it counts.

news.title: Revolution’s much-hyped RAS inhibitor hits key survival goals in phase 3 pancreatic cancer trial
news.snippet: Revolution Medicines’ pan-RAS inhibitor helped patients with a highly aggressive form of pancreatic cancer live an average of six months longer than chemotherapy, hitting a goal of the phase 3 study.

news.title: Biotech Giants and Investors Gather to Solve the Commercialisation Puzzle This May in Hong Kong
news.snippet: Join global leaders at ASGH 2026 to bridge the gap between lab breakthroughs and market execution while unlocking growth in Asia’s health economy.

news.title: Allogene’s off-the-shelf CAR-T erases lingering lymphoma cells in early slice of data
news.snippet: Cema-cel eradicated minimal residual disease in seven of 12 patients, compared to two of 12 participants in the observational control arm.

news.title: Regeneron rides into radiopharma via $2.1B biobucks pact with Australia’s Telix
news.snippet: With its latest obesity play appearing to pay off, Regeneron has turned its attention to radiopharmaceuticals.

news.title: Seaport, Hemab prepare for IPO voyages to fund depression, clotting candidates
news.snippet: Seaport Therapeutics and Hemab Therapeutics are both charting a course for the public markets.

news.title: Ideaya sees clear path to FDA as Servier-partnered eye cancer drug hits goal in phase 2/3 trial
news.snippet: A phase 2/3 trial of Ideaya Biosciences and Servier’s eye cancer candidate has hit its primary endpoint, teeing up a filing for accelerated FDA approval in the second half of the year.

news.title: BioNTech, SynOx plot paths to FDA as trials hit goals in competitive tumor types

news.title: Despite uncertainties, Travere’s Filspari emerges as first FDA-approved FSGS treatment

news.title: Regulatory tracker: FDA signs off on generics for AstraZeneca's Farxiga
news.snippet: In this tracker, Fierce Pharma is recording the regulatory progress of in-market products, including expansions into key geographies and new indications. Some of these updates may not meet the bar for

news.title: Lilly’s Jaypirca shows fixed-duration power in ‘ambitious’ phase 3 CLL trial win

news.title: ViiV launches ‘Still Here’ campaign aimed at reminding young people about HIV
news.snippet: GSK and Shionogi’s ViiV Healthcare is seeking to raise awareness around what the company sees as a forgotten element in HIV: young people with the infection.

news.title: Omnichannel Has an Access Problem. Compliant AI Fixes It.
news.snippet: Omnichannel isn’t a content problem. It’s an access problem. See how compliant AI connects HCPs and patients to the right answers instantly.

news.title: Regeneron rides into radiopharma via $2.1B biobucks pact with Australia’s Telix
news.snippet: With its latest obesity play appearing to pay off, Regeneron has turned its attention to radiopharmaceuticals.

news.title: HHS, after legal setback, updates ACIP charter to put more emphasis on vaccine safety
news.snippet: HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is continuing to reshape the CDC’s Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices in a way that’s setting off alarm bells for some experts.

news.title: UPDATED: Replimune to reduce workforce following 'disappointing' second rejection for melanoma prospect
news.snippet: The second time is not the charm for Replimune’s melanoma candidate RP1. After spurning the immunotherapy last July, the FDA has now rejected the biotech’s resubmitted application.

news.title: Starting material sourcing bottlenecks increase US drug shortage risks: report

news.title: Novartis cuts 114 more jobs at New Jersey HQ as restructuring rolls on
news.snippet: Novartis is making further workforce reductions at its U.S. headquarters in New Jersey, planning to remove 114 positions as the drugmaker rejigs its sales team for rare disease medicines.

news.title: Charles River flows into Boston to help AHA bridge cardiovascular health divide
news.snippet: Charles River Laboratories has backed an American Heart Association campaign, joining forces with the nonprofit on cardiovascular disease awareness, prevention and community health initiatives.

news.title: Envision hires ConcertAI, IQVIA alum Nick Jones as its med comms president
news.snippet: Envision Pharma Group has hired clinical research veteran Nick Jones as president of its Envision Medical Communications (EMC) business.

news.title: The top 10 pharma R&D budgets of 2025

news.title: Bial launches ‘Dialogues with Parkinson’s’ campaign aimed at identifying early symptoms
news.snippet: Portuguese biopharma Bial is launching a year-long disease awareness campaign that’s intended to boost understanding of Parkinson’s disease and its often subtle and early-stage symptoms.

news.title: Abbott survey finds ‘information overload, confusion and cost’ affecting health choices in US
news.snippet: Too much information, uncertainty and financial worries are hitting Americans when it comes to making important choices for their health.

news.title: STAT+: FDA pushes drugmakers to report missing clinical trial results
news.snippet: FDA officials said an internal analysis found results were not submitted for nearly 30% of studies “highly likely” to fall under mandatory reporting requirements.

news.title: STAT+: Federal judge tosses California No Surprises Act lawsuit against HaloMD
news.snippet: HaloMD is a middleman that became the top filer of out-of-network billing disputes on behalf of medical providers.

news.title: STAT+: GSK advancing ovarian cancer drug mo-rez

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about a pancreatic cancer pill, FDA rejecting a Replimune drug again, and more
news.snippet: Metastatic pancreatic cancer patients who received a targeted pill from Revolution Medicines lived nearly twice as long as patients who got chemotherapy

news.title: STAT+: Revolution Medicines touts ‘unprecedented’ data for pancreatic cancer pill
news.snippet: In a trial, metastatic pancreatic cancer patients on the medicine lived twice as long as those on chemotherapy.

news.title: STAT+: Allogene Therapeutics’ CAR-T treatment eliminates residual cancer cells in B-cell lymphoma patients
news.snippet: The new data bolster Allogene’s efforts to develop a new, easily administered cell therapy that could delay or prevent cancer recurrence.

news.title: STAT+: Spyre Therapeutics IBD drug shows promise in early trial
news.snippet: The inflammatory bowel disease therapy succeeded in its first major testing, setting up a competition with several large drugmakers.

news.title: Opinion: STAT+: Landmines await Vinay Prasad’s successor at the FDA
news.snippet: Who would want to be the head of the FDA's Center for Biologics Evaluation and Research?

news.title: New light shed on who benefits most from weight-loss jabs
news.snippet: People who carry variations in two genes linked to appetite and digestion can lose more weight when taking drugs to treat obesity, research suggests.

news.title: Prince William praises £20m milestone for Bowelbabe fund
news.snippet: The Bowelbabe fund, set up by Dame Deborah James in 2022, helps to support Cancer Research UK.

news.title: Weight-loss jabs will be offered on NHS for people at risk of further heart attacks
news.snippet: More than a million people in England will start being offered the anti-obesity jab for better heart health and to avoid strokes.
